---
title: "The Rev. Charles Hyde Brooke"
---

## The Rev. Charles Hyde Brooke

**Dates:** (1841-1926)

### Description

missionary in Melanesia

### Biography

See Blain, <i>Biographical Directory of Anglican Clergy in the South Pacific</i> at www.anglicanhistory.org/nz/blain_directory.pdf

### Letters

- Letter from Jan. 1, 1872.
- Letter from November 24, 1869.
- Letter from December 21, 1868.
- Letter from Christmas Day [25 December], 1867.
- Letter from March 23, 1867.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
